name: Artie Matthews
description: American songwriter, pianist and ragtime composer (1888-1958)
abstract: Artie Matthews (November 15, 1888 – October 25, 1958) was an American songwriter, pianist, and ragtime composer. Artie Matthews was born in Braidwood, Illinois; his family moved to Springfield, Illinois in his youth.

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Foster
about_quotes.evidence: A gentleman by the name of Artie Matthews, who’s a very interesting personality. I’ll have to go into detail about him very shortly.
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Foster — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Roy Carew
about_quotes.evidence: And it was arranged by Artie Matthews. Artie Matthews arranged it. Same guy with the Worry Blues.
